It matches the station registry and contract; engines/ would conflict with both.","contradiction_caught":"engines/ reduces release work","contradiction_explanation":"Release-manifest membership is required regardless of source directory.","minority_finding":"stations/ requires a scoped Go job and publish working-directory override.","evidence":["A registered station under engines/ conflicts with the station registry and current station contract.","Manifest, provenance, installer, and resolver behavior keys on IDs/assets/counts, not source directories."]}
